name: Bug Report

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Prompts Used

The prompts used to encounter the bug. And client response if helpful.

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Steps To Reproduce

If this is reproducible, the steps to reproduce it.
